info.name: PLA GraphQL API Tests
info.description:
PLA (Platypus Shoes) GraphQL API test collection.

Covers 4 feature areas:
1. Account Creation & Sign In
2. Cart & MiniCart
3. My Details (Address Book, Newsletter, Loyalty)
4. Support Features (Currency, Dynamic Data)

**IMPORTANT – Run order matters.**
Requests must be run in sequence (top-to-bottom) because later requests
depend on values saved by earlier ones (customerToken, cartId, addressId).

See Guideline/POSTMAN_COLLECTION_GUIDE.md for full usage instructions.

variable.description: GraphQL API endpoint. Change to match your target environment.
Auto-generated per run by collection pre-request script.
Unused. Kept for backward compatibility. Do not edit.

exec: // ─── Collection-level pre-request: initialise random test data once per run ───
// Generates fresh data the first time testEmail is empty (start of a new run).
// To get a new email on every run: uncheck 'Keep variable values' in Collection Runner.
const streetNames = ['Main St','High St','George St','King St','Collins St','Bourke St'];

item.name: 01 – Account Creation & Sign In
item.description:
Create a new PLA customer account, validate error handling, sign in and retrieve customer details.

Maps to: pla-account-creation-signin.spec.ts

exec: pm.test('GraphQL errors array exists with 1 entry', () => {
pm.test('Error message contains invalid email text', () => {
pm.test('Customer id is truthy – save to customerId', () => {
pm.test('GraphQL errors array exists with 1 entry', () => {
'The account sign-in was incorrect or your account is disabled temporarily. Please wait and try again later.'

item.name: PLA_SignIn – generate token for valid credentials

exec: pm.test('Token contains only safe characters (no special chars)', () => {

item.name: PLA_GetCustomerDetails – retrieve details with valid token

graphql.query: query getCustomerDetails{customer{id ...CustomerInformationFragment ...CustomerLoyaltyFragment __typename}}fragment CustomerInformationFragment on Customer{id firstname lastname email phone_number date_of_birth is_subscribed gender apparel21_id is_qff_member qff_member_number __typename}fragment CustomerLoyaltyFragment on Customer{id loyalty_program_status loyalty{level{accrual_points auto_reward_threshold auto_reward_value description level_id level_point_bonus name sequence __typename}points_balance points_to_next_reward program{apply_reward_threshold description name __typename}rewards{available customer_reward_id expiry_date pending redeemed status total __typename}reward_account_id rewards_balance spend_value_to_next_reward positive_rewards_balance_message __typename}__typename}

exec: // Guard: ensure customerToken exists before this request runs
if (!token) { throw new Error('customerToken is not set. Run SignIn first.'); }
pm.test('customer.id is a number and truthy', () => {

item.name: 02 – Cart & MiniCart
item.description:
Create carts, fetch cart item counts, and retrieve minicart/full-cart data.

Maps to: pla-cart_minicart.spec.ts

Pre-requisite: Folder 01 must have run first (customerToken must be set).

item.name: PLA_CreateCartAfterSignIn – create empty cart with valid token

exec: if (!token) { throw new Error('customerToken is not set. Run folder 01 first.'); }

graphql.query: query getItemCount($cartId:String!){cart(cart_id:$cartId){id ...CartTriggerFragment __typename}}fragment CartTriggerFragment on Cart{id total_quantity shipping_addresses{street selected_shipping_method{method_code __typename}__typename}__typename}

exec: pm.test('Error message contains invalid cart text', () => {
'Could not find a cart with ID "wbkTBuu2dxhmC6AVHT0YzUBIoOEs5M67ss"'

item.name: PLA_GetItemCount – return cart data for valid cartId

graphql.query: query getItemCount($cartId:String!){cart(cart_id:$cartId){id ...CartTriggerFragment __typename}}fragment CartTriggerFragment on Cart{id total_quantity shipping_addresses{street selected_shipping_method{method_code __typename}__typename}__typename}

exec: if (!cartId) { throw new Error('cartId is not set. Run CreateCartAfterSignIn first.'); }

graphql.query: query MiniCartQuery($cartId:String!){cart(cart_id:$cartId){id ...MiniCartFragment __typename}}fragment MiniCartFragment on Cart{id total_quantity prices{subtotal_including_tax{currency value __typename}grand_total{value currency __typename}special_price_discount{value currency __typename}discounts{amount{currency value __typename}description label __typename}__typename}...ProductListFragment ...MultipleRewardsMessageFragment ...QantasMessageFragment ...AppliedQantasPointsFragment __typename}fragment ProductListFragment on Cart{id items{id prices{row_total_including_tax{value __typename}row_total{value __typename}__typename}custom_options{option_name option_value __typename}product{id name url_key url_suffix sku thumbnail{url __typename}price{regularPrice{amount{currency value __typename}__typename}minimalPrice{amount{value currency __typename}__typename}__typename}stock_status color_name __typename}quantity __typename}__typename}fragment MultipleRewardsMessageFragment on Cart{id multiple_rewards_message __typename}fragment QantasMessageFragment on Cart{id qff_reward{is_qff_member qff_points qff_reward_message __typename}__typename}fragment AppliedQantasPointsFragment on Cart{applied_qantas_points{points_burned dollar_value member_number __typename}__typename}

exec: pm.test('Error message contains invalid cart text', () => {
pm.expect(json.errors[0].message).to.include('Could not find a cart with ID');

item.name: PLA_MiniCartQuery – return cart data, prices, rewards, qff

graphql.query: query MiniCartQuery($cartId:String!){cart(cart_id:$cartId){id ...MiniCartFragment __typename}}fragment MiniCartFragment on Cart{id total_quantity prices{subtotal_including_tax{currency value __typename}grand_total{value currency __typename}special_price_discount{value currency __typename}discounts{amount{currency value __typename}description label __typename}__typename}...ProductListFragment ...MultipleRewardsMessageFragment ...QantasMessageFragment ...AppliedQantasPointsFragment __typename}fragment ProductListFragment on Cart{id items{id prices{row_total_including_tax{value __typename}row_total{value __typename}__typename}custom_options{option_name option_value __typename}product{id name url_key url_suffix sku thumbnail{url __typename}price{regularPrice{amount{currency value __typename}__typename}minimalPrice{amount{value currency __typename}__typename}__typename}stock_status color_name __typename}quantity __typename}__typename}fragment MultipleRewardsMessageFragment on Cart{id multiple_rewards_message __typename}fragment QantasMessageFragment on Cart{id qff_reward{is_qff_member qff_points qff_reward_message __typename}__typename}fragment AppliedQantasPointsFragment on Cart{applied_qantas_points{points_burned dollar_value member_number __typename}__typename}

exec: if (!cartId) { throw new Error('cartId is not set. Run CreateCartAfterSignIn first.'); }
pm.test('cart prices – discounts is null (empty cart)', () => {

graphql.query: query GetCartDetailsAfterSignIn($cartId:String!){cart(cart_id:$cartId){id items{id product{id name sku small_image{url label __typename}price{regularPrice{amount{currency value __typename}__typename}minimalPrice{amount{value currency __typename}__typename}__typename}__typename}quantity ...on ConfigurableCartItem{configurable_options{id option_label value_id value_label __typename}__typename}__typename}prices{grand_total{value currency __typename}__typename}...CartPageFragment __typename}}fragment CartPageFragment on Cart{id total_quantity prices{grand_total{value currency __typename}subtotal_including_tax{currency value __typename}special_price_discount{value currency __typename}discounts{amount{currency value __typename}description label __typename}__typename}available_payment_methods{code title __typename}...ShippingAddressFragment ...AppliedCouponsFragment ...MultipleRewardsMessageFragment ...QantasMessageFragment ...AppliedQantasPointsFragment __typename}fragment ShippingAddressFragment on Cart{shipping_addresses{firstname lastname street postcode city available_shipping_methods{method_code method_title carrier_code carrier_title available amount{value currency __typename}__typename}selected_shipping_method{method_code method_title carrier_code carrier_title amount{currency value __typename}__typename}__typename}__typename}fragment MultipleRewardsMessageFragment on Cart{id multiple_rewards_message __typename}fragment QantasMessageFragment on Cart{id qff_reward{is_qff_member qff_points qff_reward_message __typename}__typename}fragment AppliedQantasPointsFragment on Cart{applied_qantas_points{points_burned dollar_value member_number __typename}__typename}fragment AppliedCouponsFragment on Cart{id applied_coupons{code __typename}__typename}

exec: const expected = ['Check / Money order','Apple Pay','No Payment Information Required','Credit or Debit Card','PayPal'];

item.name: 03 – My Details
item.description:
Address book CRUD, newsletter subscription toggles, loyalty program toggles.

Maps to: pla-my-details.spec.ts

Pre-requisite: Folders 01 & 02 must have run first.

exec: if (!token) { throw new Error('customerToken is not set. Run folder 01 first.'); }

graphql.query: query GetCustomerAddressesForAddressBook{customer{id addresses{id ...CustomerAddressFragment __typename}__typename}countries{id full_name_locale __typename}}fragment CustomerAddressFragment on CustomerAddress{__typename id city company country_code default_billing default_shipping firstname lastname middlename postcode region{region __typename}custom_attributes{attribute_code value __typename}street telephone}

exec: pm.test('addresses array has at least one entry', () => {
pm.test('first address id matches saved addressId', () => {
if (!addressId) { throw new Error('addressId is not set. Run AddNewCustomerAddress first.'); }
// Clean up the addressId so subsequent re-runs don't attempt to delete a deleted address

item.name: 04 – Support Features
item.description:
Store currency data and dynamic promo block data.

Maps to: pla-support-features.spec.ts

Pre-requisite: Folders 01 & 02 must have run first (customerToken + cartId).

item.name: PLA_getDynamicData – dynamic promo blocks for cartId

graphql.query: query GetDynamicData($cart_id:String!){cart(cart_id:$cart_id){dynamic_promo_blocks{discount{phrase __typename}gift{phrase __typename}message{progress_percent phrase success_phrase __typename}__typename}__typename}storeConfig{id store_code ewave_dynamicpromoblocks_discount_enable ewave_dynamicpromoblocks_general_enable ewave_dynamicpromoblocks_gift_enable ewave_dynamicpromoblocks_message_enable __typename}}

exec: if (!cartId) { throw new Error('cartId is not set. Run folder 02 first.'); }
// Clears testEmail so the next Collection Run always generates a new one.
console.log('[CLEANUP] Run-scoped variables reset. Next run will generate fresh data.');
